name_en: 【Full Leather Small】B brand Pocket runway limited edition, absolutely stunning. Retro and versatile, it's rare to find a bag that balances both aesthetics and practicality. The style is quite British, suitable for both formal occasions and casual wear. Dimensions: 23 - 6 - 26.5cm
